nasb.text: The total of the numbered men of the camp of Judah: 186,400, by their armies. They shall set out first.

esv.text: All those listed of the camp of Judah, by their companies, were 186,400. They shall set out first on the march.

cnv.text: 凡是屬猶大營，按著隊伍被數點的，共有十八萬六千四百人；他們要首先出發。

ccb.text: 犹大营区的人共十八万六千四百人，他们是开路先锋。
